cause_analysis.narrative: The Beauty Room & Co churned on 2026-03-23 after 87 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-14 (phone_call) — first complaint keyword: "problem". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-14 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.

On subsequent visits from the same device, they’ll only need to enter their name and phone number and won’t be asked to…

However, if they do it from a different device, it will be treated as a new lead, and again it will be asked. But when they come next time from that different device, they will be treated as an old lead and will directly be sent towards your booking platform.
I hope this helps, if not we can have a call. Np.
